title: wedelia rugosa var. rugosa
intro: Wedelia rugosa var. rugosa, commonly known as the Wedelia or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Wedelia rugosa var. rugosa include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and managing fever, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
